hero.paragraph: Bookrelay offers you a selection of books picked just for you: explore exclusive titles, save them and exchange opinions within the community. Share your journey with fellow readers, make the most of your time and track your progress on the platform.

registrati.title: Sign up
registrati.text: Discover new books in just a few steps. No personal data required: start exploring right away and get inspired by our first selections.

leggi.title: Read
leggi.text: Pick a book, set your time and dive into reading. The app helps you build a habit, keeping track of the moments you dedicate to your books.

condividi.title: Share
condividi.text: Join the community, see what others are reading and compare your opinions. Ask for recommendations, read reviews and talk about books with people who share your passion.

waitlist.paragraph: Leave your email to join the waitlist and get early access to our platform

form.successText: We'll write to you as soon as the app is ready for early access.
form.title: Join the Bookrelay community
form.description: We're opening access to a limited number of readers who want to discover and test the platform before the official launch. Sign up today to receive your invite and follow the project's progress closely. Early sign-ups will get early access to new features.
form.errorDuplicate: This email is already on the waitlist!
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
